ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 复制出来的路径前后会加一对反引号，防止路径里有空格 或特殊字符时出错

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 复制出来的路径前后会加上一对单引号 ' '作用和反引号类似，主要是给代码、命令行里用，防止空格导致识别错误。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 复制出来的路径前后会带上一对双引号 " "，主要用于路径里有空格时，避免被系统或软件识别成两段

ast.name: text
ast.target: Path format examples:

ast.name: text
ast.target: • File URL: file:///C:/Users/name/vault/folder/file.md (Windows) or file:///home/user/vault/folder/file.md (Linux/Mac)

ast.name: text
ast.target: • Obsidian URL: obsidian://open?vault=MyVault&file=folder/file

ast.name: text
ast.target: • Markdown Link: [[filename]] (wiki-style) or [filename.md](./path/filename.md) (standard)

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Filename: file (without extension) or file.md (with extension)
ast.target: • Filename: file (without extension) or file.md (with extension)
